name: Sekhmet-Ra the Lion-Forged
dialogue: I am a hammer that did not weather.
The Trial of Strength is the simplest of the three. It is also the cruelest.
Hit me — or I will hit harder, longer, until the desert keeps you.
preBattleLine: Sekhmet-Ra cracks his gilded knuckles. The room shudders.
postDefeatDialogue: Sekhmet-Ra falls to one knee, gold flaking from his shoulders.
"The hammer fell harder than the anvil. The Pharaoh has marked you."
He laughs once — a sound like a temple bell.
